data.title: Bedtime Stories for Kids Books
data.description:
"PickIt - Bedtime Stories" is an innovative app that transforms the reading of fairy tales into an interactive and personalized experience. Each story can be read by a parent or listened to thanks to the voice of professional narrators, creating magical and engaging moments for the whole family.

Our tales not only enchant with their plots but also offer children the opportunity to decide how the story unfolds. During the reading, various options will be presented that allow the young reader to influence the course of events, making each adventure unique and participatory.

Why choose "PickIt - Bedtime Stories"?
• Personalized stories that actively involve children
• Fascinating music that accompanies each tale
• Stories narrated by professionals for an enchanting listening experience
• New stories released every month, always providing fresh content

Behind every tale of "PickIt - Bedtime Stories" is careful and passionate work.

The stories are created by an in-house team of professional authors, capable of crafting interesting and educational tales, following precise length and structure criteria to perfectly suit the app.

Then, the storyboard is created, with rough sketches that visualize each scene of the story.

Once the storyboard is approved, an in-house team of illustrators takes care of creating the images, ensuring their style is in harmony with the story.

It's important to check how our tales will appear in the app. The text display must be pleasant and intuitive. This is the job of two other professionals: the programmer and the tester.

Only after this final step do we publish our tale. From the creation of a story to its publication, it can take between two to six months. Therefore, we can say that it is a complex but very fascinating journey!

We constantly add new tales to our collection, designed for children aged three and up. Every month, a new story will be available to enrich our app and offer fresh content to our young readers.

These stories are perfect for bedtime, offering a calming and enchanting experience that helps children wind down before sleep, whether they are listening to the soothing voice of a professional narrator or enjoying a quiet moment of reading with a parent.
These stories are fantastic bedtime books.

data.summary: Bedtime stories for kids audio books. Story Teller for toddlers. Fairy Tales.

Interactive Fairy Tales, Game Books, Bedtime Stories: Choose your path, experience the adventure!
Approved by parents, loved by children!

Made by childhood experts: WOW!
